text: Moving from the quiet order of a classroom, observed through glass like an outsider of thought, to the lively mosaic of the R+D wall—here, research and innovation shout back in vivid colors. I feel a shift from contemplation and exclusion to curiosity and creative possibility. In the classroom, I yearned for silent understanding; here, among these displays, I am invited to imagine, learn, and co-create. My mind feels more awake and engaged, compelled to participate in the unfolding stories and ideas around me.
